name: Developer Portfolio
description: This very site! Click the background to interact with the galaxy (requires WebGL).
bullets: Displayed projects using React and Tailwind CSS
Used WebGL to create an interactive galaxy background

name: Launchpad
bullets: Created custom WidgetFrame React component to wrap widgets and encapsulate resizing and positioning logic
Created email, calendar, and timer widgets, styled with Chakra UI components such as Button, Flex, and Scroll Area
Integrated Gmail and Google Calendar APIs to display user data, used googleapis-batcher to consolidate email requests
Designed Prisma schemas for use with PostgreSQL database
Incorporated GitHub API to display live changelog on homepage

name: StoryTime
bullets: Overhauled existing codebase to integrate Socket.IO websockets and synchronize clients
Created React component which uses context to display current information anywhere in the application

name: Web Pets
bullets: Ran server on Node.js, using Express for routing and MongoDB with Mongoose to save pet data
Ensured correct flow of information throughout React frontend to ensure client stayed in sync with database
Styled application with Tailwind CSS, including responsive layout for mobile devices; documented code with JSDoc
